chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-1572 of 2024 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on M.A. 7539/2024 2. For orders on office objection 3. For orders on M.A. 7540/2024 4. For hearing of main case 29.10.2024 Petitioner present in person. ----- 1. Granted. 2to4. Petitioner has stated that he be issued Arms License by giving the directions to Respondents No.1 to 4. It is prerogative of the concerned officials and if the Petitioner has any grievance he should seek remedy as per law. Petition is dismissed along with pending Application. JUDGE JUDGE Ali Haider
